title: Throne of the Forgotten Age
description: A brutal medieval survival modpack featuring guarded kingdoms, massive castles, powerful bosses, structured ranks, and disciplined steel-based progression.
body:
**A proper medieval modpack must feel disciplined, dangerous, and earned. No modern shortcuts. No overpowered nonsense early game. Steel, stone, hierarchy, and consequence. Below is a complete, professional description suitable for CurseForge or Modrinth.**

# 🏰 Throne of the Forgotten Age 
## A True Medieval Survival Experience

**Step into a world forged in steel and ruled by banners.**

Ironbound Realms transforms Minecraft into a grounded medieval survival experience where power is not given — it is earned. Vast stone castles rise from the horizon, guarded by trained soldiers. Ancient ruins hide powerful bosses. Steel weapons replace crude tools. Armor carries weight and presence. The world feels older, harsher, and alive.

This is not fast progression. This is legacy progression.

## ⚔️ Core Gameplay Experience
🛡 Structured Combat

Combat is slower, deliberate, and tactical. Spears outrange swords. Shields matter. Armor defines your role. Charging blindly into battle will get you killed.

## 🏰 Living Kingdoms

Villages are no longer helpless. Guards patrol gates, defend towns, and enforce order. You can build your own settlement, raise soldiers, and create a functioning medieval colony.

## 🗡 True Weapon Variety

Halberds, longswords, maces, crossbows, tower shields — each weapon has purpose. Combat feels grounded in medieval warfare rather than arcade-style fighting.

## 🧱 Massive Structures & Exploration

The world generates with enormous castles, abandoned watchtowers, underground fortresses, and ancient strongholds. Exploration feels meaningful and dangerous.

## 👑 Rank & Progression (Optional System)

Advance from:
**Peasant → Squire → Knight → Commander → Lord**

Ranks are earned through:
• Boss victories
• Advancement milestones
• Settlement development
• Crafting elite armor sets

Higher ranks unlock prestige gear and command authority.

## 🐉 Boss Encounters

Face structured boss progression across:
• Underground dungeon overlords
• Mythical beasts and dragons
• Corrupted warlords
• Ancient forest guardians

**Bosses require preparation, proper armor, and strategy — not brute rushing.**

## 🏕 Immersion & Atmosphere

• Medieval-themed world generation
• Realistic armor designs
• Guard patrol AI
• Expanded dungeon systems
• Balanced survival difficulty
• Medieval ambient music
• Hard-mode focused balance

**_Elytra flight is discouraged. Survival and ground travel matter again._**

## 🔥 Intended Playstyle

This modpack rewards:
• Strategic planning
• Settlement building
• Combat mastery
• Exploration discipline
• Long-term progression

It punishes:
• Careless rushing
• Ignoring armor tiers
• Underestimating bosses

## ⚙ Recommended Settings

• Hard Difficulty
• Reduced Keep Inventory
• No minimap (optional hardcore mode)
• Custom advancement tree enabled

## 🎯 Final Vision

Ironbound Realms is built for players who want discipline in progression, pride in armor, and fear when entering unknown lands. Every castle has a story. Every banner represents power. Every boss victory feels deserved.
